title: Radio 2 DJ Trevor Nelson taking break from broadcasting over health issues
summary_full: BBC presenter, 62, ‘concentrating on getting better, being back to 100% me and getting back behind the mic’Trevor Nelson has announced he is taking a break from broadcasting because of health issues.The BBC Radio 2 presenter and DJ, who has not been on air all week, said he was taking time out after being advised to go for medical tests following a routine check-up.
